channel.title: nomeatdisco TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from nomeatdisco

item.title: BUMP TO PLATE - WEEK 19 - CHIPOTLE TOFU TACOS with a Mango Salsa 💃 THIS WEEKS RECIPE AND WAY MORE BABY INFO IS ON MY SUBSTACK - Link in bio x So yeah… Week 19. Which means two things: 1. The baby is now the size of a mango 2. We’re officially at that

item.title: GOCHUJANG BRAISED JERSEY ROYALS 🥔 I got invited to the island of Jersey by @jerseyroyals for a trip to see how these amazing potatoes have been grown for generations. I adopted a row of potatoes that were planted a month ago, when I got there they were

item.description: WEEK 1 - 6 WEEK TRAINING BLOCK FOR A 10km 🏃‍♂️ So I’ve decided to run a 10km race, it’s the @great_run and I’ve been invited to do it by @luckysaintbeer I’m actually feeling very motivated to go again, after telling myself I wouldn’t race this year with

item.title: BUMP TO PLATE - WEEK 20 - GRAPEFRUIT SALAD 🥗 We’re officially halfway in our pregnancy journey and this week we found out we’re having a LITTLE BABY GIRL! We’re so so happy! I’ve written a full substack post giving you guys all the nutrients mothers nee

item.title: KUNG PAO TOFU 🍜 This is something I have for an easy dinner all of the time. Serve it with rice or noodles and you’re on to a winner! Ingredients 1 block of firm tofu (I used @tofoo ) 2 tbs corn starch 1 tsp MSG 2 tsp cracked pepper The veg: 1/2 gree
item.description: KUNG PAO TOFU 🍜 This is something I have for an easy dinner all of the time. Serve it with rice or noodles and you’re on to a winner! Ingredients 1 block of firm tofu (I used @tofoo ) 2 tbs corn starch 1 tsp MSG 2 tsp cracked pepper The veg: 1/2 gree

item.title: LONDON MARATHON TOP TIPS 🏃‍♂️ A few simple tips for race day at @londonmarathon tomorrow! Number 1 - make sure you fuel right. Fuel is key, I’ve done races where I haven’t fuelled hardly at all and feel horrible and like I cannot run another step. Where

item.title: NEW SERIES - BETTER LUNCHES 🍱 Welcome to my new series. Haven’t done a food related series in a while and I’m super excited about this one! If you struggle with lunches every day and end up having the same boring ones, this series is there to help you b

item.title: EP. 1: BETTER LUNCHES - CHICKEN, BACON & SWEETCORN WRAP 🌯 Welcome to the first episode of Better lunches where I make lunches that are more exciting than the usual suspects. Today Molly wanted a ceaser wrap. So I based the principle off that, but made so

item.title: EP. 3- BETTER LUNCHES - SHEET PAN TOFU KEBAB 🫓 This one is probably going to hit some nerves and be a bit controversial, but having been vegan for 9 years this is where I currently stand. Ingredients For the kebab: 1 block firm tofu 2 tbsp aquafaba 1

item.title: A core memory before our life changes slightly… @mollyclarkie and I have been going to festivals and gigs since we met nearly 8 years ago. Music is what we know and part of our existence and it’s why I fell in love with Molly in the first place. One of t

item.title: BUMP TO PLATE - 27 WEEKS - CAULIFLOWER 🌳 This weeks recipe is to represent our baby at 27 weeks - Popcorn Cauliflower with a Red Thai Dipping Sauce. Recipe and baby progress on my Substack - link in bio! #vegan #popcornchicken #thaifood #babylove #recip

item.title: The best weekends are usually the simplest ones // AD | A campervan, a few hikes, good food and a jar of SKIPPY® Peanut Butter. No big plans. Just making time for the things that bring a little bit of joy. Where there’s a jar, there’s joy. @SKIPPY® Peanut
item.description: The best weekends are usually the simplest ones // AD | A campervan, a few hikes, good food and a jar of SKIPPY® Peanut Butter. No big plans. Just making time for the things that bring a little bit of joy. Where there’s a jar, there’s joy. @SKIPPY® Peanut

item.title: MY DEBUT COOKBOOK IS AVAILABLE TO PRE-ORDER NOW!!! NO MEAT DISCO - A Seven Ingredient Cookbook SEPTEMBER 2026. Pre order now x The link is in my bio x Love you all and I owe this one to all of you, I can’t wait for you guys to get your hands on it. 🧡 @Li
